title: Get SHOP how-to guides, tools, and other resources for agents & brokers
main-title: Agent and broker resources for SHOP
meta-description: Authorized agents and brokers can help consumers get SHOP coverage by using the tools available on HealthCare.gov
title-short: SHOP health insurance resources for agents and brokers
bite: Resources and tools available on HealthCare.gov make assisting clients easier for agents and brokers registered with the Small Business Health Options Program (SHOP)
page_name: Get SHOP Marketplace how-to guides, tools, and other resources for agents & brokers
excerpt:
These resources and tools make it easier for you to help clients in the Small Business Health Options Program (SHOP). For more resources, visit the employer’s resource page.

Advise & enroll small businesses for SHOP plans

  • Custom premium estimates: Answer a few questions about your client's business to get a custom premium estimate
  • The SHOP Full-Time Equivalent (FTE) Calculator: See if your clients may be eligible to participate
  • The Small Business Health Care Tax Credit Estimator: See if your clients may qualify for a tax credit and how much it may be worth
  • Minimum Participation Rate Calculator: Find out if your clients meet the participation requirement

Fast answers for agents & brokers

  • Get fast answers to your most pressing questions.
  • Check out frequently asked SHOP questions

Questions?

Contact the SHOP Call Center at 1-800-706-7893 (TTY: 1-888-201-6445).
